canonicalUnityBridgePackage.rootMirrorRole: Deprecated/Mirror install artifact; do not treat as source of truth.
canonicalUnityBridgePackage.summary: Plugin-local unity-package is the canonical package source.

inputBridge.summary: Use AInvilRuntimeInputTestBridge for production validation; keep AInvilInputTestBridge only for compatibility/sample scenes.

scenarios.title: AInvil Unity Bridge operational smoke validation
Dungeon Recovery Company first playable recovery job E2E

remainingIssues: Retest required after camera, material, player marker, target marker, and objective banner fixes.
The current experience still relies on prototype UI/text and does not yet provide a full game-like tutorial flow.
E-key recovery feedback is still minimal and should eventually receive animation/audio/VFX beyond this generated primitive slice.
User requested broader design improvement; this pass only applies minimal generated-folder UX fixes.

productMvpWorkflow.nextAction: Treat as Product MVP Ready Candidate evidence; continue manual playability and public install gates separately.

exampleContamination.summary: harness/scenarios/inventory_grid_ui.json is an example harness scenario.
validation/evidence/EVID-top-down-collectible-latest.json is sample evidence and must not satisfy operational release gates.

e2eHappyPath.name: User request intake
e2eHappyPath.evidence: Defined by interactive agent instructions; not yet stored as a standalone runtime event.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Add request IDs to run logs when product telemetry is introduced.

e2eHappyPath.name: Unity change dry-run
e2eHappyPath.evidence: Guarded transition dry-run exists, but project-specific Unity change-set dry-run is not generalized yet.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Connect project-specific Unity change sets to transition candidates.

e2eHappyPath.name: Unity Bridge apply/read path
e2eHappyPath.owner: MCP Unity Server / Unity Editor Bridge
e2eHappyPath.evidence: Unity Bridge health endpoint is reachable.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Open Unity, install the canonical package, and run Tools > Codex Unity Bridge > Start Server.

e2eHappyPath.name: Compile check
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Rerun doctor after Unity Bridge connectivity is restored.

e2eHappyPath.name: Operational validation scenario registration
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Keep at least one classification=Operational scenario for release gates.

e2eHappyPath.name: Play Mode or Unity inspection validation
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Run the operational bridge smoke scenario after Unity Bridge and compile checks pass.

e2eHappyPath.name: Evidence export
e2eHappyPath.evidence: 6 evidence file(s) detected; non-sample Passed evidence=true.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Keep sample evidence separate and link operational evidence to acceptance IDs.

e2eHappyPath.name: Traceability refresh
e2eHappyPath.evidence: Traceability view exists; operational evidence linkage still depends on a Passed run.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Regenerate traceability after operational evidence is captured.

e2eHappyPath.name: Dashboard refresh
e2eHappyPath.evidence: Dashboard exists and can show productization status.
e2eHappyPath.nextAction: Run generate-project-dashboard after productization report updates.

featureStatuses.name: Agent Skills
featureStatuses.evidence: 역할 지침은 구현되어 있으나 런타임 검증 기능 자체는 아닙니다.

featureStatuses.name: Director Layer
featureStatuses.evidence: 제품 판단 규칙과 워크플로우 지침으로 존재합니다.

featureStatuses.name: Platform Core
featureStatuses.evidence: 그래프/리포트/워크플로우 코어는 실행 가능하나 E2E Unity 검증은 막혀 있습니다.

featureStatuses.name: Production Intelligence
featureStatuses.evidence: 보고서 생성기는 존재하지만 live validation gap이 남아 있습니다.

featureStatuses.name: Workflow Runtime
featureStatuses.evidence: guarded sync와 산출물 생성은 가능하지만 Unity mutation/validation promotion은 하지 않습니다.

featureStatuses.name: Transition Planner / Approval / Executor
featureStatuses.evidence: 전환 후보와 dry-run 실행은 가능하지만 실제 Unity 변경 경로와는 분리되어 있습니다.

featureStatuses.name: CLI
featureStatuses.evidence: 상태 조회와 guarded sync 명령이 존재합니다. productization 리포트 명령으로 E2E 상태를 보강합니다.

featureStatuses.name: MCP Unity Server
featureStatuses.evidence: Unity Bridge health endpoint is reachable.

featureStatuses.name: Unity Editor Bridge
featureStatuses.evidence: Unity Bridge health endpoint is reachable.

featureStatuses.name: Input Test Bridge
featureStatuses.evidence: Use AInvilRuntimeInputTestBridge for production validation; keep AInvilInputTestBridge only for compatibility/sample scenes.

featureStatuses.name: Benchmark System
featureStatuses.evidence: 벤치마크 데이터와 리포트는 존재하지만 제품 E2E 검증과는 분리된 평가 체계입니다.

featureStatuses.name: Sample Harness Fixtures
featureStatuses.evidence: top_down_collectible 등은 제품 운영 시나리오가 아니라 예제/fixture로 분류해야 합니다.

featureStatuses.name: Root UnityPackage Mirror
featureStatuses.evidence: 루트 UnityPackage는 설치 편의 mirror/deprecated artifact로만 취급합니다.
